mnemonics: REQUIRE: Requirements Engineered Quickly Underpin Integrated Repository Evolution
keyPoints: Requirements analysis must be business-driven, not IT-driven.
The data model (conceptual, logical, physical) is the primary design artifact.
The grain (level of detail) of fact tables is the most critical design decision.
commonMistakes: Designing the data warehouse based on the source system structures instead of business requirements.
Defining fact table grain at too high a level, losing analytical detail.
Including non-additive or textual data in a fact table instead of a dimension.
